/usr/bin/ar qc libulisse_ctrl_lib.a  CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/vehiclecontroller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/helper_functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/configuration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/states/genericstate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/states/state_halt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/states/state_latlong.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/states/state_hold.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/states/state_speedheading.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/states/state_navigate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/commands/genericcommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/commands/command_halt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/commands/command_hold.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/commands/command_latlong.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/commands/command_speedheading.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/commands/command_navigate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/events/generic_event.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/events/event_rc_enabled.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/tasks/ActionTask.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/tasks/SafetyBoundaries.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/tasks/AngularPosition.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/tasks/ControlDistance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/tasks/MakeCurve.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ulisse_ctrl_lib.dir/src/ulisse_ctrl/tasks/Hold.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libulisse_ctrl_lib.a
